target_state: 100 curated final or final-candidate rows, with replacements recorded rather than added by inflation
fail_condition: More than 100 claimed final rows without reserve/drop decisions.

target_state: At least 100 final rows have proof of artwork/capture/redraw/source-card readiness plus caption/provenance/rights fields
fail_condition: Any selected final row lacks asset path or source/provenance status.

target_state: 0 uncaptured selected screenshots; all captured, replaced, or dropped
fail_condition: Any selected screenshot lacks raster hash, source URL/title, timestamp, and blocker caption.

target_state: 0 selected photos with unresolved license/attribution/revision status
fail_condition: Any selected photo has unknown license, author, revision, commercial/fair-use status, or blocked physical claims.

current_state: 2 local hashed GTC surfaces plus raw/card duplicate families
target_state: One representation per GTC claim job in final layout
fail_condition: Raw slide and claim card both appear for the same GTC job without render-proven need.

current_state: Chapters 2-5 have one selected exhibit each
target_state: Chapters 2-5 each have 3-4 strong source-backed exhibit candidates
fail_condition: Any early technical chapter stays below 3 strong candidates after replacement work.

current_state: 11 chapters over target; 19 rows above four-per-chapter ceiling
target_state: No chapter exceeds four final exhibits without explicit narrative/render exception
fail_condition: Overfull chapters remain crowded by quota inertia rather than spread evidence.

current_state: Mixed caption readiness across selected rows
target_state: Every final caption teaches one thing, names source/provenance, and blocks the tempting false claim
fail_condition: Caption implies adoption, revenue, productivity, rank, safety, roadmap delivery, or physical claims not supported.

current_state: Source and asset ledgers exist but not every final row is audited
target_state: Every final row has source IDs, access date, rights status, story purpose, and blocker
fail_condition: Any final row lacks a complete provenance chain.

current_state: Many SVGs ready; final render not proven
target_state: All final exhibits pass PDF/page-level legibility and contrast checks
fail_condition: Small text, axes, captions, source labels, or screenshots are unreadable at final size.

current_state: 100 selected rows but uneven chapter density
target_state: Visual roles vary by chapter and serve story rhythm, not quota filling
fail_condition: Visuals repeat the same grammar or interrupt prose without narrative payoff.

current_state: Full-book visual PDF QA not passed
target_state: Full-book render passes broken-ref, missing-caption, overflow, crop, and figure-order checks
fail_condition: Any final spread has broken refs, missing captions, overflow, unreadable charts, or ugly layout failure.
